content.text: Directions: Describe the picture in at least 5 sentences. You will have 60 seconds to prepare and 60 seconds to speak. Begin with: {{picture_start}}

gradingInfo.problemInfo:
## Picture Description

Listen to the student's description of the picture.

**Starting sentence:** {{picture_start}}

![Reference Image](media/sample_picture.png)

Evaluate whether the student:
- Used the given starting sentence correctly
- Described the picture with at least 5 sentences
- Used appropriate vocabulary
gradingInfo.gradingInfo:
### Scoring Rubric

| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 10 | **Outstanding** - Rich vocabulary, well-organized, 5+ sentences, accurate description |
| 8 | **Good** - Adequate vocabulary, mostly organized, 5 sentences |
| 6 | **Average** - Basic description, some organization, 4-5 sentences |
| 4 | **Below Average** - Limited vocabulary, poor organization, \u003c4 sentences |
| 2 | **Poor** - Very brief, difficult to follow |

### Key Points

- Check if the student used the starting sentence
- Count the number of meaningful sentences
- Evaluate the accuracy of the description
